headline: 4 Industrial Stocks Set to Outshine Q1 Earnings Estimates
summary: Four industrial stocks, Stanley Black, Illinois Tool, Parker-Hannifin and Hubbell. are poised to beat Q1 earnings, driven by strong end-market demand and pricing gains.

raw.headline: 4 Industrial Stocks Set to Outshine Q1 Earnings Estimates

headline: Hubbell Reports Regular Quarterly Dividend
summary: Shelton, CT -The Board of Directors of Hubbell Incorporated today declared a regular quarterly dividend of $1.42 per share on the Company's common stock. The dividend will be paid on June 15, 2026...
